results.title: Jelly Roll -Bunnie Divorce: All you need to know
results.description: Jelly Roll and Bunnie XO (Alisa DeFord) are currently going through a divorce after nearly a decade of marriage, according to multiple court records and entertainment outlets reporting in mid-June 2026. Jelly Roll, the Grammy-winning country artist (real name Jason DeFord), filed for divorce in Williamson County, Tennessee, with the paperwork reportedly submitted in May [...] The post Jelly Roll -Bunnie Divorce: All you need to know appeared first on MM News .
